# Windows x64 Release

## Recommended Download

`Check-Point-Trusted-Access-Review-Windows-x64.zip`

Extract the ZIP and run `Check-Point-Trusted-Access-Review-Windows-x64.exe`. No installation, Node.js, npm, or Git is required. Windows SmartScreen may warn because the test build is not commercially code-signed.

The app binds to `127.0.0.1`, prefers port `4000`, moves upward when a port is occupied, and opens the selected URL in the default browser.

## Current Checksums

```text
EXE  7715fa0c53e518a20d06a8b4451f91d8fe5109f436b15bf26d81aa83d95a1f41
ZIP  19532a7f51e92d46c2961b8aa2d57a996b482e147165cc0172152b2e85d1aef1
```

The `archive/` folder contains an older local ZIP and should not be published.
